ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline – 15 September
ham.body:
Dear Students,

This is a friendly reminder that the deadline for your semester project submission is approaching. Please ensure that you submit your final report and accompanying presentation slides by 15 September at 23:59 UTC. You can upload your files through the course portal at <URL>.

If you have any questions or need an extension, contact the project coordinator before the deadline.

Best regards,
Professor Jane Doe
Course Coordinator

spam.subject: Urgent: FedEx Delivery Fee Payment Required – Action Needed Immediately
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Our records indicate that your recent shipment (Tracking #123456789) was not delivered due to an outstanding delivery fee. To avoid shipment return and additional penalties, please verify and pay the pending fee immediately.

Visit <URL> to confirm your billing information and complete payment. Failure to resolve within 24 hours will result in automatic return of the package and further charges.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
FedEx Customer Support Team
